869 FALL_ASLEEP_CD FALL_ASLEEP_CD D0150C1 Mood: Trouble falling or staying asleep: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has had trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much. 0=No
1=Yes
9=No response effective 10/01/2023
